case_title: HWASUK WON VS. MARGARET SHARA et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WON, HWASUK AS TO DEFENDANT SHARA, MARGARET GRUTZIK, DENIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED THRU *DMV*, SERVED ON SEP-28-2012 PER CODE SECTIONS VC 17455 THRU VC 17463 (SERVICE FEE $0.00) AS TO DEFENDANT GRUTZIK, DENIS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED THRU *DMV*, SERVED ON SEP-28-2012 PER CODE SECTIONS VC 17455 THRY VC 17463 (SERVICE FEE $0.00) AS TO DEFENDANT SHARA, MARGARET

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-14-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVICE PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL DEFENDANTS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY KOREAN INTERPRETER---HAN LEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 11/05/12 TO PLAINTIFF HWASUK WON, "VACANT/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
LETTER FROM HWASUK WON RE PREVIOUS HEARING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2013 - CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO RE-SERVE
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO HWASUK WON OF SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED 506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION - SENT TO PLAINTIFF
